arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou backs Tottenham’s Djed Spence for England call-up
arts.sum: Spence has emerged as a key player since he made his long-awaited first start for Spurs in December.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou tips Wilson Odobert for 'big impact' after £25m summer transfer
arts.sum: Spurs boss has placed an enormous amount of faith in the youngster despite an injury-hit debut campaign

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou sets challenge for 'laid back' Djed Spence as deliberate Spurs strategy pays off
arts.sum: The defender has had to wait a long time to kick-start his Spurs career

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on positive Cristian Romero scan update, Djed Spence and Bergvall
arts.sum: Yeah, look, I think, as I said, for us, it's been kind of – it's not just the guys coming back from injury, which are important, but they need time to sort of get up to speed. With the Europa League, there's no doubt it's been a difficult season, last week we saw protests outside, you've had injury after injury after injury, the results have suffered in the Premier League, the last two cup performances didn't go your way, but it feels like, with players coming back, there is still an opportunity to do something special this season.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'request name change' in leaked email to Premier League broadcasters
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are often referred to as either 'Tottenham' or 'Spurs' but the Premier League club have written to broadcasters and informed them of what they wish to be called

arts.ttl: Tottenham target Angel Gomes set to leave Lille on a free transfer
arts.sum: According to a report from Fabrizio Romano, Lille midfielder Angel Gomes (24) is set to leave the Ligue 1 club on a free transfer. The England international midfielder’s contract at the…

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min decision made as £40m man drops out: Tottenham predicted starting XI v Ipswich
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will seek to make it three Premier League wins in a row when they head to Ipswich Town on Saturday. Spurs managed to...

arts.ttl: The Comeback: Vicario... exclusive behind-the-scenes documentary available now
arts.sum: In an exclusive documentary, entitled ‘The Comeback: Vicario’, the Italian international goalkeeper gives us unprecedented access to the hours and days after his injury, the weeks of rehab and months of anguish he went through as he slowly worked his way back to fitness. “When I stood up from the ground, I had this feeling in my ankle that it was not stable,” he says, recalling what happened at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Tottenham handed major injury boost with key duo in line to return for Europa League showdown
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou hopes to have both Cristian Romero and Micky van de Beek back for the first leg of the Europa League last-16 contest against AZ Alkmaar.

arts.ttl: 'Definitely have a chance': Paul Merson predicts which out of Spurs and Man United could win the Europa League
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United are both in the last 16 of the Europa League and will fancy their chances of going all the way....
